thumbnails.label: A안 — 인물 + 구체 사건 + 짧은 텍스트 (승리 공식)
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic portrait of Donald Trump, US President, standing in a dimly lit military command room with an intense, grim expression, furrowed brow and clenched jaw. Behind him, a massive digital map screen shows the Strait of Hormuz glowing in red with military vessel icons and fire/explosion markers. Orange and red warning lights reflect on his face. The atmosphere is dark and tense with navy blue and deep red color tones. Shot from a slightly low angle to emphasize authority and gravity. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.label: B안 — 인물 + 차트/데이터 배경
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic portrait of Shin Hyun-song, Bank of Korea Governor, a Korean man in his 60s wearing a dark navy suit and tie, sitting at a press conference podium with a serious, contemplative expression. Behind him, a large LED screen displays a dramatic upward oil price chart in bright red with the number '$100' prominently displayed, and a Korean Won exchange rate ticker showing decline. The lighting is cold and institutional with blue-white fluorescent tones. His hands are clasped in front of him suggesting a difficult decision ahead. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.label: 와일드카드 — 다른 인물 + 현장감
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic aerial photograph of the Strait of Hormuz at dusk with a single small cargo ship sailing through eerily empty waters. In the foreground, a stern-faced Iranian military officer in olive green uniform looks out from a patrol boat, his expression cold and defiant. Thick black smoke rises from a distant point on the horizon. The water reflects deep orange sunset tones mixed with ominous dark navy shadows. The vast emptiness of the strait — normally packed with hundreds of ships — creates a haunting sense of absence and danger. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
